case_title: CHERYL HARRIS VS. DAVID PANG et al

docket_entries.description: CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO PATRICK J. BOUSHELL BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF DEC-27-2012 AT 1:30 PM.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-27-2012 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,400.00 FILED BY HARRIS, CHERYL AS TO DEFENDANT PANG, DAVID BOUSHELL, PATRICK J. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-27-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE BAD ADDRESS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF HARRIS, CHERYL AS TO DEFENDANT BOUSHELL, PATRICK J.

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HARRIS, CHERYL ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE BY THE SHERIFF DEPT., "UNSUCCESSFUL - DEFENDANT WAS NOT FOUND". (SERVICE FEE $35.00<WAIVED>) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HARRIS, CHERYL AS TO DEFENDANT PANG, DAVID

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-27-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-27-2012 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFEDANT DAVID PANG, WHO WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HARRIS, CHERYL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PANG, DAVID STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
